org_constraint: The email should be at least eight sentences long but not exceed twelve sentences.
new_constraint: The email should include precisely three paragraphs, with each paragraph containing five sentences.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email should be at least eight sentences long but not exceed twelve sentences. The email should include precisely three paragraphs, with each paragraph containing five sentences.

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I am writing to express my sincere admiration for the work showcased at your gallery. I have been following your exhibitions for some time and am consistently impressed by your curated selections. Your commitment to featuring diverse and compelling artists is truly remarkable. I am a passionate art enthusiast eager to explore new creative voices. I hope this email finds you well and that your current season is thriving.

I would be grateful if you could provide information regarding your upcoming exhibition schedule. Specifically, I am interested in seeing any contemporary or modern art shows planned for the next few months. Do you have a digital calendar or a dedicated page listing future events? I am also curious if there are any special artist talks or opening receptions scheduled. I am very much looking forward to visiting your beautiful space soon.

Thank you so much for taking the time to read my inquiry. I appreciate any information you can provide about your future programming. Please let me know the best way to access your full exhibition calendar. I am also happy to follow your updates on social media platforms. I look forward to hearing from you and visiting the gallery soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<turn|>
